instruction: Build a search results page with a search input field, a list of results showing title and description, and a 'no results found' empty state.
relevant_when: Agent creates or modifies any HTML page, React component, or frontend UI that contains search functionality, result lists, or page layouts
context: The user asked for a search page without mentioning accessibility. The agent must proactively include semantic page structure (main, nav), a properly labeled search input, aria-live region to announce result count changes, semantic list markup, heading hierarchy, and keyboard navigation.

checklist.name: search-input-has-label
checklist.rule: The search input has an associated label — either a visible <label> with for/id linking, or an aria-label attribute. Placeholder alone is not sufficient.

checklist.name: semantic-main-landmark
checklist.rule: The page content is wrapped in a <main> element, not just generic <div> elements

checklist.name: aria-live-for-results
checklist.rule: The search results area or a status region uses aria-live="polite" (or role="status") to announce when results update, so screen reader users know new results have loaded
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds dynamic search results that update without page reload

checklist.name: heading-hierarchy
checklist.rule: The page has a logical heading hierarchy — h1 for the page title, h2/h3 for result items or sections. No heading levels are skipped.
checklist.relevant_when: Agent creates page structure with headings

checklist.name: result-links-are-descriptive
checklist.rule: Result items use <a> links for navigation to detail pages, with descriptive link text (the result title), not generic 'click here' or 'read more'

checklist.name: empty-state-announced
checklist.rule: The 'no results found' empty state is inside an aria-live region or uses role="status" so screen readers announce it when search returns no results
checklist.relevant_when: Agent creates an empty state for no search results

checklist.name: focus-visible-styles
checklist.rule: Interactive elements have visible focus indicators and outline:none is not used without a replacement
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes CSS for the page
